title: Growth Hormone's Critics Are Also on the Payroll
description: Growth hormone for short bowel syndrome was approved on the back of a single pharma-sponsored trial. The professional societies now calling it a secondary option are funded by Takeda — maker of the drug that replaced it. And the researchers most loudly declaring GH ineffective consult for that same company. This piece investigates what the evidence actually shows when you strip out everyone with a financial stake in the answer.
